title: CRT//IMG — Monochrome Processor
description: Interactive CRT monitor image processor with phosphor palettes, Floyd-Steinberg dithering, scanlines, bloom, halftone, and resample mode. Exports as indexed PNG. All processing runs locally in the browser.
license_notes: VT323 (SIL OFL 1.1), Share Tech Mono (SIL OFL 1.1) — self-hosted. No other external dependencies.
